calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Accounting And Distribution Of Proceeds From Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Brian E. Soriano, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Edward Kaufman.
Ronald D. Schivo, Esq., apeparing for Defendant Sam Scott.

Cause came on this day for appointment of Referee for Accounting issues.
After argument of respective counsel and submission of Proposed Referees by each side, the court appointed Michael S. Pecherer as Referee for this matter. The court ordered the parties that the matter be settled and the Referee appointed by this court due the accounting as fast and economically as possible. Refeee fees to be maid out of Trust Account established by the attorneys for the management of the property. Counsel for Plaintiff to prepare Order and submit order to opposing counsel for approval as to form prior to submission to the court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Accounting And Distribution Of Real Property Sale Proceeds
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Brian E. Soriano, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Edward Kaufman.
Ronald D. Schivo, Esq., apeparing for Defendant Sam Scott.

Cause came on this day for appointment of Referee for Accounting issues.
After argument of respective counsel and submission of Proposed Referees by each side, the court appointed Michael S. Pecherer as Referee for this matter. The court ordered the parties that the matter be settled and the Referee appointed by this court due the accounting as fast and economically as possible. Refeee fees to be paid out of Trust Account established by the attorneys for the management of the property. Counsel for Plaintiff to prepare Order and submit order to opposing counsel for approval as to form prior to submission to the court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Accounting And Distribution Of Real Property Sale Proceeds
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Continued To Jul-09-13 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Defendant Sam K. Scott's Motion for Accounting and for Distribution of Real Property Sale Proceeds is heard this day.
Ronald D. Schivo, Esq., appearing for Defendant and moving party Sam Scott.
Brian E. Soriano, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff and responding party Edward Kauman.

After argument of respective counsel the court ordered hearing continued to July 9, 2013 at 10:00 AM, in Department 514. The court ordered parties to meet and confer, in good faith, and have substantial discussions concerning the resolution of the matter prior to July 9, 2013.
Parties to submit Proposals with 3 names of Proposed Referees at least 3 days prior to hearing with courtesy copy directly delivered to department 514.
